discover.title: Discover
discover.subtitle: Find PhD programs and advisors, rank by what matters to you, then import into your applications.
discover.honesty: Stipends and deadlines are research snapshots — always verify on official pages.
discover.notesPlaceholder: Your notes — saved on this account
discover.noProgramsHint: Broaden regions, lower the stipend floor, or clear search.
discover.hIndexExplanation: The h-index combines publication output and citation impact. An h-index of 20 usually means at least 20 papers have each been cited 20 times. It varies by field and career stage, so use it only as a supporting signal and verify the source date.
discover.extraNotesPlaceholder: GRE, fee waivers, city size, visa concerns…
discover.notifyMatches: Notify me about new top matches
discover.notifyDeadlines: Remind me about watched program deadlines
discover.notifyHint: Uses in-app notifications and any verified receive-mailbox with notify enabled.
discover.rankerHint: Drag weights to re-rank programs live. Total does not need to be 100.
discover.insightsHint: Lightweight stats on your current catalog slice — not a substitute for official data.
discover.paretoHint: Programs high on both match and real stipend sit toward the upper-right of your shortlist.
discover.intakeCta: Set your criteria to personalize ranking
discover.useAiHint: Uses your saved AI key to enrich fit notes and optionally suggest programs. Never invents official stipends.
discover.useAiNoKeys: Add a research model key in Profile / Settings first.
discover.reqVerify: Snapshots only — confirm every rule on the official program page.
discover.reqEmpty: No structured requirements yet — verify on the official site.
discover.upcomingDeadlinesHint: Typical-cycle dates from the catalog — always verify officially.
discover.topFitsHint: Highest match programs for your current criteria and ranker weights.
discover.overviewCtaBody: Set criteria, optionally enable AI multi-agent research, then rank and import programs into your applications.
discover.intakeStepNotifyHint: Notifications, AI agents, and catalog source — then run research.
discover.seedProgramsPlaceholder:
One per line, e.g. MIT EECS
ETH Zurich Robotics
discover.useAiMultiHint: Runs Program Scout → PI Analyst → Stipend Verifier → Outcomes Checker with your saved AI key. Never invents official stipends or h-index.
discover.strategyTipsHint: Plain-language recommendations from your current catalog slice.
discover.paretoHintFull: Programs that are not dominated on both match and COL-adjusted stipend.
discover.clustersHint: K-means style grouping on match, real stipend, COL, and advisor density.
discover.heatmapEmpty: Add interest tags in criteria to power the heatmap.
discover.nextActionCriteria: Set your field, regions and funding floor so the ranking reflects your priorities.
discover.nextActionResearch: Run the research flow once to refresh program, advisor and funding evidence.
discover.nextActionWatch: Review the top matches and watch 3–5 serious candidates before starting applications.
discover.nextActionDeadline: Your nearest visible deadline is in {days} days. Verify it and prepare the required materials.
discover.nextActionImport: Your shortlist is ready. Add a program to the application workspace and begin the checklist.
discover.nextCheckAdvisor: Confirm at least two fitting advisors
discover.nextCheckEvidence: Open official funding and deadline sources
discover.nextCheckImport: Import only when the evidence is good enough
discover.shortlistHint: {count} visible programs, ranked for your current priorities.
discover.inspectorWhyBody: Match is useful only when funding, deadlines and advisor availability can be checked. Missing evidence is shown instead of guessed.
discover.inspectorNextSummary: Verify, watch, then add to applications
discover.inspectorStepSources: Open the official program and funding sources.
discover.inspectorStepAdvisor: Check recent work from the best-fitting advisors.
discover.inspectorStepImport: Add the program when you are ready to start its checklist.
discover.decisionAnalysisHint: Open one view at a time. Every chart explains what it shows and what action it supports.
discover.tradeoffSummary: Find programs that are strong on both fit and after-cost funding.
discover.tradeoffAria: Scatter plot comparing match score and cost-of-living adjusted stipend
discover.tradeoffSelected: Match {match}; real purchasing power {money} per year.
discover.tradeoffWhat: Each dot is one program. Right means a stronger match; higher means more spending power after local costs.
discover.tradeoffHow: Programs near the upper-right offer the strongest balance. A lower-left dot is not automatically bad, but it needs a clear reason to keep.
discover.tradeoffNext: Select a dot, inspect its evidence, then watch only the options that still make sense after verification.
discover.deadlineRunwaySummary: The nearest visible deadline is in {days} days.
discover.deadlineRunwayEmpty: No dated deadlines are available yet.
discover.deadlineRunwayAria: Upcoming program deadlines over the next 120 days
discover.deadlineWhat: Each row ends at a program deadline. Shorter lines need attention sooner.
discover.deadlineHow: Red is urgent, orange is approaching, and green has more runway. These dates are snapshots until officially verified.
discover.deadlineNext: Verify the nearest dates first, then add material reminders after importing the program.
discover.evidenceHealthSummary: Average evidence completeness is {score}% across visible programs.
discover.evidenceWhat: The bar measures whether sources, funding, deadline, restrictions and advisor links are available—not whether admission is likely.
discover.evidenceHow: A fuller bar means fewer unknowns. It never turns an estimate into an official fact.
discover.evidenceNext: Open the selected program, resolve the missing items, then import only the evidence you trust.
discover.analysisCaveat: These views describe the current catalog and your saved preferences. They are decision aids, not admissions predictions.
discover.enrichNoMatch: No close catalog match was found. Research or add this program in Discover first.
discover.enrichPreviewError: Could not generate the enrichment preview.
discover.enrichApplyError: Could not apply the selected changes.
discover.enrichEmptyBody: Add a discovered program first, then return here to research and fill its missing details.
discover.enrichIntroBody: PhD Atlas compares the application with your Discover catalog and shows every proposed change. Existing values are never selected for replacement by default.
discover.enrichUseAiHint: Uses only the application and catalog evidence shown here.
discover.enrichMatchHint: Catalog match confidence: {score}%. Intelligent research suggestions are labeled separately.
discover.enrichReplacementWarning: This replaces an existing value and is left unselected.
discover.catalogToolsHint: Import or export research snapshots. Existing catalog entries are preserved when merging.
discover.honestySummary: Research snapshots guide decisions; official pages remain the source of truth.
discover.enrichReplacementGroupHint: Collapsed for safety; review only if you intend to replace saved information.
discover.catFamousDescription: Established scholar whose research also fits
discover.compareEmptyBody: Select programs from the list to compare funding, deadlines, advisors and application rules side by side.
discover.compareLimit: You can compare up to four programs.
discover.compareSummary: Strongest research match: {match}; strongest verified funding: {funding}.
discover.enrichSheetSubtitle: Review proposed additions before anything is written to your application.
discover.exportCatalogHint: Download the current research snapshot for backup or review.
discover.importCatalogHint: Merge a saved research snapshot without removing current entries.
discover.intlEligibleBody: The current record indicates international applicants are eligible. Funding and visa terms still need official confirmation.
discover.intlRestrictedBody: The current record indicates restrictions for international applicants. Verify the official eligibility page before applying.
discover.piNotePlaceholder: Add contact context, questions or follow-up notes…
discover.piSummary: This advisor matches your selected topics. Confirm current projects and recruiting status from the official profile before contacting them.
discover.programNotePlaceholder: Add a private note about fit, funding or next steps…
discover.recruitingCaveat: Recruiting status changes frequently; verify it before contacting the advisor.
discover.researchPreservesState: Updates never overwrite watched, hidden or personal notes.
discover.researchSheetSubtitle: Set durable criteria once; refresh results without losing your decisions.
discover.searchAll: Search programs, advisors, topics or cities…
discover.selectAdvisor: Select an advisor to view details.
discover.selectProgram: Select a program to view details.
discover.useApplicationsAsSeeds: Use my applications as starting points
discover.useApplicationsAsSeedsHint: Keep current applications in scope while finding adjacent programs and advisors.
discover.useConfiguredResearchHint: Use a configured research model to supplement catalog evidence. Unverified facts remain labeled.
discover.fitSummaryVerified: This program matches your direction, with {count} relevant advisors and verified funding.
discover.fitSummaryUnverified: This program matches your direction, with {count} relevant advisors; funding still needs verification.
discover.enrichDossierValue: Program fit, funding, requirements, outcomes and official sources
